basic_details.job_title: TISS Assistant Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Assistant Electrician Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 27-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years for Assistant Electrician.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 10th Standard pass from a recognised board, Valid Electrician License compulsory, ITI (Electrician) certificate holders preferred
qualification.details: Minimum 10th Standard pass from a recognised board. Valid Electrician License compulsory. ITI (Electrician) certificate holders preferred. Experience in electrical field particularly in maintenance and repair works.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Assistant Electrician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tiss.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Assistant Electrician Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss: Minimum 10th Standard pass from a recognised board, Valid Electrician License compulsory, ITI (Electrician) certificate holders preferred

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Electrician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Assistant Electrician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Minimum 10th Standard pass from a recognised board. Valid Electrician License compulsory. ITI (Electrician) certificate holders preferred. Experience in electrical field particularly in maintenance and repair works.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 50 years for Assistant Electrician.

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Assistant Electrician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.tiss.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Assistant Electrician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application form for the Assistant Electrician post at TISS is 27th July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the specified address by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Electrician posts in TISS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Electrician position in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences recruitment drive. Interested candidates should check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for TISS Assistant Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Assistant Electrician posts at TISS. Applicants can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Assistant Electrician post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Assistant Electrician position at TISS must not be more than 50 years of age. Age relaxation details, if any, should be verified from the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for an Assistant Electrician at TISS?
faq.answer: The selected Assistant Electrician will receive a salary of Rs. 981/- per day. This is a contractual position, and the remuneration is on a daily basis as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Assistant Electrician?
faq.answer: Applicants must be at least 10th Standard pass with a valid Electrician License. ITI (Electrician) certificate holders are preferred, along with relevant experience in electrical maintenance and repair works.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for TISS Assistant Electrician posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TISS Assistant Electrician recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Assistant Electrician at TISS?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Electrician post at TISS involves an Offline Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Assistant Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the TISS Assistant Electrician recruitment can be downloaded from the official website www.tiss.ac.in. A direct link is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS)?
faq.answer: The official website for Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is www.tiss.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information regarding the institute and recruitment updates.
